description: Set a global gitignore file that applies to every repo on your machine
intents: set up a global gitignore for all my repos
ignore files everywhere without putting them in every .gitignore
tell git to ignore my editor backup files in every repo
system wide ignore pattern across all projects
ignore .DS_Store in every repo without committing a .gitignore
personal ignore file that applies to every clone
stop tracking my swap files in every project at once
